Our Mission

About PitQuest

When it comes to good BBQ, we want to go beyond the norm and explore all. Mainstream to hidden gems — PitQuest sets the standard in finding great BBQ no matter where you are.

BBQ is more than food — it's a tradition, a culture, and a community. Whether you're chasing a legendary pitmaster's brisket or stumbling onto a roadside gem, PitQuest is your guide to the best smoke in America.

Built with love in Clarksville, Tennessee. 🔥
